title: damp.osc~

messages.description: frequency and trigger value (normalized to MIDI range)
damped oscillator with cosine initial phase
damped oscillator with sine initial phase

flags.name: -midi
flags.description: sets to MIDI pitch frequency input

methods.description: sets to MIDI pitch frequency input

body: [damp.osc~] is based on a complex pole resonant filter ([vcf2~]) with two ouputs (real/cosine and imaginary/sine). It takes frequency in hertz or midi and a decay time in ms. It is triggered by signals at zero to non zero transitions or by lists at control rate.
